title: planchonella fragrans
intro: Planchonella fragrans, also known as the fragrant tree, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae that is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Planchonella fragrans lie in its bark, which contains various compounds with antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Planchonella fragrans is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses.
